OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
PLaintiff, John Britton, is present.
Attorney, Karen Uchiyama, is present representing the plaintiff.

Defendant. Maria Rita Flamenco, is present.
Attorneys, Sarah Marriot and Ian Johnson, are present representing the defendant.

Defendant, Miguel Arco Velasco, is present pro per.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains on calendar.
